top.name: Rewind
top.rules_text: Return the last resolved spell to the stack. It resolves again with original targets.

channel.name: Rewind (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: You may choose new targets for the rewound spell

bottom.name: Temporal Shield
bottom.rules_text: Gain 7 shield. When shield breaks rewind: restore HP to what it was when shield was applied.
